name: INTERNATIONAL BANCSHARES CORP
summary: International Bancshares Corporation is a Texas-based multibank financial holding company operating five subsidiary banks across north, south, central, and southeast Texas and Oklahoma. It provides commercial and retail banking services including checking and savings deposits, commercial and real estate loans, international trade finance, letters of credit, foreign-exchange services, credit cards, mortgage lending, and online/mobile banking. The company operates 166 facilities and 247 ATMs serving 75 communities.

products.name: IBC Bank Online
products.description: Internet banking product providing customers 24-hour online access to banking information and services.

products.name: IBC Mobile Banking
products.description: Mobile banking product providing users 24-hour banking access from mobile devices.

products.name: Commercial and Industrial Loans
products.description: Lending services for businesses including international trade customers along the U.S.-Mexico border.

products.name: Letters of Credit
products.description: International trade finance service supporting cross-border commerce, particularly with Mexico.

products.name: Foreign-Exchange Services
products.description: Currency exchange services supporting international banking customers, primarily from Mexico.

products.name: Mortgage Lending
products.description: Consumer home lending services offered through subsidiary banks.

products.name: Credit Cards
products.description: Consumer and business credit card products offered through subsidiary banks.

products.name: Securities Products
products.description: Investment securities products made available through third-party providers.

partnerships.description: 50% ownership interest in investment banking activities.
